title: Purdue drone initiatives focus on the future of autonomy in the sky
summary_en: Purdue University's cutting-edge initiatives and research with drones and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are combining with the latest artificial intelligence and autonomy to quickly turn ideas and imagination into attainable reality.
title_cn: 普渡大学无人机项目聚焦空中自主技术未来发展

title: New Manufacturing Studio supercharges engineering in Indianapolis
summary_en: You can't spell "Boilermaker" without "maker!" That Purdue spirit of designing and building things carries on in the new Manufacturing Studio in Indianapolis — a haven for students to machine parts, create prototypes and supercharge their engineering education.
title_cn: 新型制造工作室助推印第安纳波利斯工程学科发展

title: Purdue launches comprehensive quantum degrees program
summary_en: The comprehensive quantum degrees program is designed to build the quantum workforce and economy.
title_cn: 普渡大学推出综合性量子学位项目

title: SCALE expands its national impact, becomes Purdue's largest federally funded research effort
summary_en: The Scalable Asymmetric Lifecycle Engagement (SCALE) program, the only U.S. defense microelectronics public-private-academic workforce development consortium, is now Purdue University's largest-ever federally funded research effort.
title_cn: SCALE扩大全国影响力，成为普渡大学规模最大的联邦政府资助研究项目

title: IE's She awarded National Science Foundation grant
summary_en: In coordination with the US National Science Foundation, the Advancing Innovations for Empowering NextGen AGriculturE (AI-ENGAGE) initiative recently announced its six international research award recipients, collectively receiving $2.4 million to support artificial intelligence and emerging technologies.
title_cn: 教育学院佘姓学者获国家科学基金会资助

title: Purdue hosts 12th Midwest Workshop on Control and Game Theory, advancing research and collaboration
summary_en: Purdue University welcomed researchers, students and industry professionals from across the region for the 12th Midwest Workshop on Control and Game Theory (MWCGT), held April 25–26 in West Lafayette.
title_cn: 普渡大学主办第十二届中西部控制与博弈论研讨会 推进研究工作与合作交流

title: College of Engineering welcomes 38 incoming graduate fellows
summary_en: The Purdue University College of Engineering has named 38 incoming graduate students as Lambertus Doctoral and Graduate Excellence Fellows, recognizing exceptional academic achievement and strong potential to advance engineering research and innovation.
title_cn: 工程学院迎来38名新入学研究生奖学金获得者
